name: todo-list
description: To-Do List Application — monorepo (walking skeleton). See docs/.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:tokens && npm run build -w @todo/api && npm run build -w @todo/worker && npm run build -w @todo/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @todo/web && npm run lint -w @todo/api
scripts.test: npm run test -w @todo/api && npm run test -w @todo/worker
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:shared && npm run build:tokens && npm run db:migrate && npm run test -w @todo/e2e
